response.justification: Candidate has strong, broad IC experience (15+ years) and some adjacent dev-tooling exposure (MCP generators, CI/CD setup, test frameworks like Trial and Fluent-Asserts), but the resume shows no formal people-management role, no direct reports, and no evidence of leading organizational change. The job is a Level II Manager position requiring 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership in a defined scope, plus mobile-platform context — none of which are demonstrated. Workshop and course delivery suggest mentoring aptitude, but that is not a substitute for managerial track record.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Direct dev-tooling and testing-infrastructure work (MCP generators, Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup)
Demonstrated ability to teach and uplevel others via multi-module Selenium course and recurring Refactoring Dojos
concerns: No explicit people-management role or direct-report responsibility on the resume
Minimal mobile-platform ecosystem experience (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016, nothing recent)
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap at the scope this role requires

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal people management experience
